title: Realsim 4J
description: A modpack inspired by various bedrock addons for java
body:
Inspired by bedrock addons such as realisim craft and actions and stuff, RL4J aims to bring most of features from those packs to java through the use of mods and resource packs.

**Features**
- Overhauled world gen
- Optimizations
- Qaulity of life
- Overhauled ambiance
- Controller support

**Notes**
- A bare minimum of 2GB of ram is required to run this pack.
- Incompatable with shaders!
